deficit_span.speaker: teacher
deficit_span.verbatim_quote: another thing about following directions you guys aren t very confident in yourselves you keep looking at your friend s papers

context_excerpt.speaker: teacher
context_excerpt.text: it just wants us to factor out a number remember that we were talking about that with ms d we talked a lot about prime composite but it s not always going to come back today we re worrying about the factors now should we put them in the diagram yet

context_excerpt.speaker: teacher
context_excerpt.text: no i m looking around and i m seeing people already putting them in the diagram what i want you to do is just list them underneath and then we re going to put them together another thing about following directions you guys aren t very confident in yourselves you keep looking at your friend s papers factors of 30 what do i do student n

context_excerpt.speaker: teacher
context_excerpt.text: can t hear you tell me a factor of 30

scenes.rationale: The teacher attributes the behavior (looking at peers' papers) to a global characterization that students lack confidence in themselves, framing the issue as a deficit within the students rather than in the task or directions.
